mano_cua.result_summary: _children子列正常显示（身份证号、邮箱、居住地址在详细资料下），控制台无prop is required报错。但多级表头视觉不一致：基本信息和详细资料两个分组头在不同行级别渲染，基本信息在row1而详细资料在row2，造成表头结构不对齐
mano_cua.last_reasoning: _children sub-columns properly displayed. Browser console has NO errors or prop is required warnings. However, visual bug in multi-level header: 基本信息 and 详细资料 are rendered at different header levels, creating inconsistent multi-level header structure.
